meaning: 梅尔卡[索马里东南部港市]
examples: In Merca you risk your life if caught watching the football game.
On October 31, 1977, a final case was discovered in the port town of Merca.
Ali Maow Maalin survived his illness and continued to reside in Merca doing a variety of different tasks.
Miss Starlin claims to be ruling Merca with the consent of all the clans there.
She was born in Merca and her family had lived there for generations.
